task_description: Redesign generate_excel.py to produce an Excel file with lookup functionality. The user selects Gender (Pria/Wanita) and Age (0-85) in input cells, and INDEX/MATCH formulas automatically display the relevant premium data. Two sheets: Konvensional and Syariah. Header changed to PETRUS JAKUB MANULIFE 087781896087 with clickable WhatsApp link.

verification.summary: Script runs without errors. Output XLSX is valid with 2 sheets (Konvensional, Syariah). Konvensional has 30 INDEX/MATCH formulas, Syariah has 39. Data validation dropdown present for gender. Header is PETRUS JAKUB MANULIFE with WhatsApp hyperlink. 5160+ numeric premium values stored correctly. All acceptance criteria met.
